title: Welcome to PayPatch!
content: Track group expenses, split bills with friends, and settle up easily. You are currently viewing cached announcements.
author: PayPatch Admin

title: Offline Mode Fallback Enabled
content: It looks like you are offline. Adding new expenses or creating groups will be available once your network connection is restored. In the meantime, you can inspect cached logs.
author: System Notification

title: Smart Bill Splitting Tips
content: Tip: Click on any group in your list to view the detailed breakdown of who owes what, see recent receipts, and settle balances in a single tap.
author: PayPatch Support
